resources.string: Create a temporary @aster.cx address that auto-expires.
Recipients will lose access after the chosen window.
External recipients must enter this password to open the message.
Private email that actually protects you. No surveillance, no ads, no backdoors.
Every message is encrypted with your keys before leaving your device. Not even Aster can read your mail.
We store only ciphertext - never plaintext, never metadata. Your data belongs to you, always.
Create disposable aliases that forward to your real inbox. Burn any one without affecting the rest.
End-to-end encrypted email for people who actually give a damn about their privacy.
Enter your credentials to access your account
One account for all Aster services. Free, secure, and private.
Create a strong password to protect your account
Add a recovery email from another provider. This is optional but recommended for account recovery.
Please wait a moment before resending
That email is already in use
Write down these words in order and store them somewhere safe. This is the ONLY way to recover your account if you forget your password.
Start free or unlock more with a paid plan. You can change this anytime.
You are on the free plan. Upgrade for more storage, custom domains, and priority support.
Your encryption keys are stored locally on this device and are never sent to our servers.
Store this key safely. It is the ONLY way to recover your account if you forget your password.
I have saved my recovery key in a safe place
Enter the email address associated with your account
We\'ve sent a password reset link to your recovery email. Check your inbox and click the link to continue.
Enter one of the recovery codes you saved when you created your account.
Choose a strong password for your account
Your old recovery codes have been invalidated. Save these new codes in a safe place.
Your account has been recovered. Sign in with your new password.
Messages you send will appear here
Drafts you\'re working on will appear here
Star important emails to find them quickly
Suspicious emails will be caught here
Archive emails to keep your inbox clean
Messages you schedule will appear here
Snoozed emails will wake up here
Permanently delete all messages in trash? This cannot be undone.
Mark this email as spam and block the sender?
Permanently delete this email? This cannot be undone.
Only you and the sender can read this message.
Encrypted in transit, stored securely on Aster servers.
Tracking pixels and external requests were removed.
You are about to leave Aster and open this link in your browser:
External images, fonts, and trackers blocked
This message is encrypted with a key this device does not yet hold. Open it on the Aster web app to read.
No app to open this file
Pick which actions appear in the bottom bar when reading an email.
Failed to mark all as read
Failed to mark all as unread
Tap "Scan inbox" to find newsletters and marketing senders.
Your message will be saved as a draft if you go back, or discarded permanently.
Messages to this recipient are encrypted with their identity key. Only they can read them.
Messages to this recipient are encrypted in transit using TLS. The recipient\'s server may be able to read them.
All searches are encrypted end-to-end. Your mail is decrypted locally on this device - nothing is sent to the server.
This will read contacts from your device and import them into Aster. Your contacts are encrypted before being stored.
Earn $2.00 for each friend who subscribes
Display name impersonates a known brand
Asks for password or sensitive data
Sender domain \"%1$s\" mimics \"%2$s\" using look-alike characters
Sender domain \"%1$s\" resembles \"%2$s\" with substituted characters
Display name contains \"%1$s\" but email is from %2$s
Display name contains email \"%1$s\" but sender is %2$s
Detected on your device. Aster never reads your email.
Warning signs found on this device:
Play a sound for new mail
Your vault is re-encrypted on this device. Old keys are preserved so existing messages stay readable.
Your password protects your vault and end-to-end encryption keys. Choose something long and unique.
Add a second factor to protect your account
Enter your account password and a current code from your authenticator app to turn off two-factor.
Enter a current code from your authenticator app. Your previous backup codes will be invalidated.
Save these backup codes somewhere safe. Each one can be used once if you lose your authenticator.
Your old backup codes no longer work. Save these somewhere safe.
Enter the code from your authenticator app
Enter one of your saved backup codes
Every message is encrypted with your identity key before it leaves this device. Aster servers store only ciphertext.
Compare this with the recipient\'s fingerprint over a trusted channel to verify it\'s really you.
Identity key unavailable on this device. Sign in again to refresh your local key material.
Your identity key is rotated every time you change your password. Past keys are kept locally so older messages stay decryptable.
Key rotation, PGP key management, and contact key verification are available in the web app.
Your password is required to view your recovery key.
Your recovery key is the only way to regain access if you lose your password. Aster cannot recover it for you.
No recovery key found. Recovery codes are set during account creation and stored in your encrypted vault. Try logging out and back in to refresh your vault.
You haven\'t created any aliases yet
Permanently delete %1$s? Mail sent to this alias will bounce.
Any apps using this key will stop working immediately. This cannot be undone.
Custom domains must be managed on desktop
Adding and configuring custom domains requires DNS setup and is only available through the desktop app.
Disposable addresses that forward to your inbox. Burn any one without affecting the rest.
Compose a message and select a ghost alias as the sender to generate one
Invite friends to try Aster and earn credits when they subscribe to a paid plan.
Share your referral link with anyone you think would like Aster.
They sign up with your link and subscribe to a paid plan.
You both earn $10 in Aster credit, applied to your next renewal.
$10 for you, $10 for your friend when they sign up for Aster.
Earn Aster credits by completing different tasks.
Credit applies automatically to purchases and renewals on paid plans.
Both you and your friend will receive $10 after they sign up for Aster.
Download the Aster app for iOS
Download the Aster app for Android
You will receive $10 after signing in.
Download the Aster app for Desktop
You will receive $10 after signing in.
You also get 5% of every payment they make for as long as they\'re subscribed.
Try Aster, it\'s private email that actually works.
Could not load billing information. Please check your connection and try again.
Confirm your password to cancel. Your plan will remain active until the end of the current billing period.
Senders you never hear from again
Forward incoming mail to another address while keeping a copy in your inbox.
All incoming mail will be forwarded
Add a signature that appears at the bottom of every email you send.
This alias already has a signature.
Save reusable replies and snippets you can drop into any message.
Send automatic out-of-office replies to incoming senders.
Senders will receive an automatic reply.
No automatic reply is being sent.
Skip auto-replies to people inside your domain.
Tell us what\'s on your mind. We read every message.
Describe what you love, what\'s missing, or what\'s broken.
Your account email will be attached so we can reply. We never share feedback.
Importing mail from another provider isn\'t available yet on any Aster client. Forward old mail to your Aster address or set up auto-forward at the source.
Bulk export of mail archives isn\'t available yet on any Aster client. Your messages remain end-to-end encrypted on the server and can be retrieved at any time.
Server-side mail rules aren\'t available yet on any Aster client. Use Blocked senders, Auto-forward, and Subscriptions for related controls.
Link Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, or any IMAP account. Aster fetches mail, encrypts it on this device, and stores only ciphertext on our servers.
Couldn\'t load your linked accounts. Pull to retry.
Couldn\'t start sign-in. Check your connection and try again.
Couldn\'t save the account. Verify the host, port, and credentials.
Your session expired. Sign out and back in to continue.
Google, Outlook and Yahoo sign-in will work on Android in a future release. For now, use Manual setup below with an app password.
Sign in once and we\'ll keep your other mailbox in sync.
More space, more aliases, no ads.
For power users and small teams.
Send emails at a future date and time. Available on Star and above.
Mute notifications during a daily quiet window. Available on Star and above.
Set messages to self-destruct after a set time. Available on Nova and above.
Free plan allows 15 snoozed emails. Upgrade for unlimited.
Connect Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, and other IMAP accounts. Available on Star and above.
Use your own domain for sending and receiving. Available on Star and above.
Receive mail to any address on your domain. Available on Nova and above.
Pair desktop clients like Thunderbird or Apple Mail. Available on Star and above.
Upload your own PGP keys and rotate them. Available on Nova and above.
Protect labels with a password. Available on Nova and above.
Manage your plan in your browser.
Storage upgrades are purchased through your browser.
Subscription will end at the next billing date
Session expired - please sign in again
Could not set default payment method
Strip remote trackers from incoming mail
Hide online status and typing indicators
Enable advanced tools and unsafe actions
Display full SMTP headers on every message
Skip TLS verification for local servers
You haven\'t created any labels yet
You haven\'t created any folders yet
Generate one below to get started
Connect Slack in the web app
Manage calendar integration in the web app
Set up Zapier workflows in the web app
By creating an account, you agree to our
Password must be at least 12 characters
Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
Server error. Please try again later.
Connection timed out. Please try again.
Secure connection failed. Please try again.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
New password must be at least 8 characters
New password must be at most 128 characters
New password and confirmation do not match
New password must be different from current password
Permanently delete your account and data
Your account, mailboxes, contacts, and encrypted vault will be permanently deleted after a 30 day grace period. You can cancel by signing in again within that window.
Deletion is scheduled 30 days out. Sign in again before then to cancel.
Failed to sign out other sessions
This message is PGP-encrypted. Open the Aster web app to read it on a device that holds the matching PGP key.
No folders yet - create one from the sidebar
No labels yet - create one from the sidebar
Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
Session unavailable - please sign in again
I\'m currently away and will reply when I return.
Everything you need to get started with private, encrypted email.
More storage, more aliases, and your first custom domain.
More storage, custom domains, and unlimited aliases.
Maximum storage, unlimited everything, and dedicated support.
This email failed its domain\'s authentication requirements. It may be spoofed or improperly forwarded.
Email authentication verifies that a message really came from its claimed domain. When a check fails, the message may be spoofed, tampered with, or forwarded in a way that breaks the signature.
SPF (Sender Policy Framework) checks whether the sending server is authorized by the domain owner. A failure means the email came from an unapproved server.
DKIM (DomainKeys Identified Mail) verifies a cryptographic signature added by the sending domain. A failure means the signature is missing, invalid, or the message was altered.
DMARC tells receivers what to do when SPF or DKIM fail. A failure means the domain explicitly does not authorize this message.
Automate what happens to incoming mail
Create a rule to organize incoming mail automatically.
You\'ve reached the limit of your current plan. Upgrade to keep going.
You\'ve reached your %1$s limit on the %2$s plan. Upgrade for more.
More storage for messages and attachments
Incoming mail will be rejected until you free up space or add storage.
You\'ve hit the free plan limit. Unlock more on a paid plan.
Running low on recovery codes. Regenerate soon.
This will invalidate your current recovery codes. Make sure to save the new ones immediately.
Save these codes somewhere safe. Each code can only be used once.
Automatically find encryption keys for contacts
Only send to recipients with known keys
Display lock icons on encrypted emails
Publish your public key to Web Key Directory
Publish your key to public keyservers
Sign in again to restore your key material.
Only you can read your messages
Increases the contrast between text and background colors throughout the app, making content easier to read.
Replace transparent elements with solid colors
Replaces semi-transparent backgrounds and overlays with solid colors, improving legibility for some users.
Adds underlines to all hyperlinks in emails so they\'re easier to identify without relying on color alone.
Use OpenDyslexic typeface throughout the app
Switches the app font to OpenDyslexic, which uses heavier bottoms on letters to indicate direction and help prevent letter rotation for people with dyslexia.
Increase letter spacing and line height
Increases letter spacing and line height throughout the app to improve readability.
Disables navigation transitions and other motion effects. Useful for people who experience motion sickness or vestibular disorders.
Reduce spacing to fit more content on screen
Reduces padding and spacing throughout the app to fit more content on screen at once.
Reduce data usage on slow connections

Blocks all non-essential network requests to keep Aster usable on slow or metered connections. Disables profile pictures, sender logos, external images in emails, attachment previews, and custom fonts. All emails are rendered as plain text.
Group emails in the same conversation together
Display the size of each email in the inbox list
Always render email content in dark mode
Delay sending so you can undo if needed
Automatically detect and filter spam into your spam folder
Session: unlocks when you close or your session ends. On leave: locks immediately when you navigate away.
Show the Developer tab with build info, crypto status, and debug tools
Automatically add addresses you send to as contacts
Get notified when a new device signs in to your account
Sends you an email whenever your account is signed in from a new device or location. Good for catching unauthorized access early.
No keys registered. Register on desktop.
Devices you trust for 2FA bypass will appear here
Prevent email senders from tracking when you open messages
Emails can load images from outside servers. When they load, the sender\'s server sees your IP and knows you opened the message. This blocks those images from loading.
Stop invisible tracking beacons embedded in emails
Invisible 1x1 images hidden in emails. When they load, the sender sees your IP, when you opened the message, and your device type. Aster removes them before they can load.
Remove link redirects that track your clicks
Links in emails often redirect through a sender\'s server first so they can record whether you clicked. This strips those redirects so links go straight to the destination.
Show a warning before opening links that may be dangerous
Shows a warning before opening any link that goes outside Aster. Helps you spot phishing attempts before you click through.
Remove location and device metadata from images you send

Photos taken on phones and cameras embed hidden data - GPS coordinates, device model, timestamp, and lens info. When you send an image, this data travels with it. Aster strips it before upload so recipients only see the pixels.
Let senders know when you read their emails
Manage your encryption keys and settings
Add a custom domain to send and receive with your own address
Show full alias settings panel by default
Include sender email in reverse alias address
Keep the alias active when you unsubscribe
Automatically disable the alias when you unsubscribe
Block the sender and disable the alias
Create a directory to auto-generate aliases.
Controls how the original sender\'s name appears when mail is forwarded through your alias.
How sender appears in forwarded emails
Choose what happens when someone emails an alias you\'ve disabled.
What the sender sees when emailing a disabled alias
Controls whether deleted aliases go to trash first or are removed immediately.
Move to trash or delete immediately
When enabled, the full alias settings panel is shown by default instead of collapsed.
Makes reverse aliases include the sender\'s email address so you can tell who is replying.
Your data will be decrypted on your device, not on the server.
This export creates a ZIP file containing your decrypted emails and/or contacts. Anyone with this file can read your data. Store it somewhere safe and do not share it.
I understand this export contains my decrypted data
Single file - compatible with Thunderbird, Apple Mail, Outlook
One .eml file per message, organized in a folder
Your private key will be exported in armored PGP format. Enter your account password to authorize the export.
Add extra storage to any plan. These add-ons are stackable.
Advanced app protection with app lock and enhanced security.
App lock and other Vanguard protections will be turned off.
Require PIN or passphrase to open the app.
Use a 4, 6, or 8-digit PIN to lock the app.
Use a custom passphrase for stronger protection.
Passphrase must be at least 4 characters.
Too many attempts. Wait before trying again.
Use your fingerprint or face to unlock
Enter your current PIN to change it.
Enter your PIN to disable app lock.
Alias directories let you receive email at any address using a shared key prefix. Share your directory and anyone can reach you without exposing your real address.
Create alias directories on astermail.org to use them here
View members and manage your plan on astermail.org
A family plan lets you share storage and features with up to 5 members.
